# Ui.IsAppInvokable method

Returns `true` when a tool's effective visibility includes `"app"` — i.e. the rendered UI MAY invoke it over the channel (spec §26.3, R-26.3-e).

```csharp
public static bool IsAppInvokable(ToolUiMeta meta)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| meta | The tool's `ToolUiMeta`. |

## Return Value

`true` when app-invokable.
